def: Lasting for a very short time.

def: Askew, crooked, or arranged diagonally.
ex: The picture frames hung cattywampus after the movers left.

def: Completely satisfactory; in fine order.
ex: After the apology, everything between them was copacetic.

def: Excited commotion or extravagant publicity.
ex: Despite the hoopla, the sequel opened quietly.

def: To obtain something by cleverness or trickery.
ex: He finagled two backstage passes from a friend of a friend.

def: To pamper and overprotect someone.
ex: The coach refuses to mollycoddle his star players.

def: To coax someone with flattery or gentle pleading.
ex: The kids wheedled an extra hour of cartoons from the sitter.

def: Expressed clearly in few words.

def: Honest, open sincerity in speech.

def: Dealing with things in a practical, realistic way.
ex: A pragmatic fix now beats a perfect fix next quarter.

def: Holding on firmly; refusing to give up.
ex: The tenacious reporter followed the story for two years.

def: Able to express ideas clearly and effectively.
ex: The most articulate student summarized the debate in one minute.

def: Able to recover quickly from setbacks.
ex: The resilient town rebuilt its pier within a year of the storm.

def: Extremely careful and precise about details.
ex: Her meticulous records made the audit painless.

def: Working with steady, careful effort.

def: Sharply perceptive and shrewd in judgment.
ex: An astute buyer noticed the flood marks behind the paint.

def: Careful and sensible about the future.
ex: It was prudent to book the earlier flight before the storm.

def: Careful and sparing with money or resources.
ex: Their frugal habits paid off the mortgage seven years early.

def: Highly skilled at something.

def: Giving much information in few words.
ex: The best cover letters are concise and specific.

def: The ability to understand and share another person's feelings.
ex: Good nurses pair clinical skill with genuine empathy.

def: The quality of being honest and morally consistent.
ex: Voters valued her integrity more than her speeches.

def: Practical know-how and shrewd judgment.
ex: Her marketing savvy doubled the food truck's lunch line.

def: Strong, healthy, and able to withstand stress.
ex: The bridge design proved robust through three floods.

def: Able to adapt to many different uses or roles.
ex: A cast-iron skillet is the most versatile pan in the kitchen.

def: Possible to do with the means available.
ex: Solar panels for the barn roof are finally feasible this year.

def: Capable of working or surviving successfully.
ex: The co-op proved a viable model for the small grocery.

def: Clear, logical, and convincing.
ex: Her cogent argument won over the skeptical board.

def: Logical, consistent, and clearly connected.
ex: After coffee, his notes finally formed a coherent plan.

def: Truthful and straightforward, even when awkward.
ex: Be candid with the contractor about your budget.

def: Fond of company; sociable.
ex: Their gregarious host introduced every guest to three others.

def: Friendly and pleasant in manner.
ex: The amiable barista knows half the town by name.

def: Easy to talk to; warm and friendly.
ex: An affable mechanic explained the repair without jargon.

def: Cheerful, friendly, and warm.
ex: The genial innkeeper waved from the porch every morning.

def: Warm and polite, though not necessarily close.
ex: The rivals kept their handshake cordial for the cameras.

def: Serious and sincere in intention.
ex: His earnest apology mended the friendship.

def: Firmly loyal and unwavering.
ex: She remained steadfast through the company's leanest year.

def: Firmly determined and unwavering.
ex: The climbers stayed resolute despite the closing weather.

def: Showing good judgment and sensible care.

def: Showing sharp, refined judgment and taste.
ex: The shop caters to discerning coffee drinkers.

def: Sharp-witted and clever in practical matters.
ex: A shrewd trade brought the team two future draft picks.

def: Careful not to offend when handling delicate matters.

def: Courteous, kind, and pleasant, especially to guests.

def: Selflessly concerned for the well-being of others.

def: Careful to do one's work thoroughly and well.

def: Fair and impartial to everyone involved.

def: Very attentive to detail and hard to please.

def: Direct and outspoken in an honest way.
ex: Be forthright about the car's history and it will still sell.

def: To shock or excite people into action.

def: To support or strengthen something.

def: To encourage the growth or development of something.

def: To gather or earn something, such as support or praise.
ex: The documentary garnered awards on three continents.

def: To gather information or leftovers bit by bit.

def: To sharpen or refine a skill over time.

def: To make something less severe or harmful.

def: To ease pain or reduce a problem's severity.

def: To cut something short or reduce it.

def: To strengthen against attack or stress.

def: To capture and put something to productive use.

def: To create or perform something without preparation.

def: To fill with energy and life.

def: To light a fire, or to stir up a feeling.

def: To gather up strength, courage, or people.

def: To think about something carefully.

def: To improve something with small careful changes.

def: To make someone or something feel fresh and young again.

def: To bring new life and energy to something.

def: To make a process simpler and more efficient.

def: To combine parts into a coherent whole.

def: To publicly support a cause or proposal.

def: To communicate or transport something.

def: Quick and skillful in movement or action.

def: Quick, energetic, and refreshing.

def: Tough enough to endure harsh conditions.

def: Sharp, eager, or highly developed.

def: Quick and light in movement or thinking.

def: Brief, forceful, and full of meaning.

def: Arriving or happening exactly on time.

def: Having great power or effect.

def: Clever at finding ways around difficulties.
ex: A resourceful camper can fix almost anything with duct tape.

def: Loyal, committed, and dependable.

def: Careful with money; avoiding waste.

def: Alert and watchful for danger or trouble.

def: Full of energy, life, or bright color.

def: Cleverly and quickly humorous.

def: Filled with energetic, passionate devotion.

def: Sharp, quick judgment, especially in business.

def: Calm self-control under pressure.

def: Proper, polite behavior suited to the occasion.

def: The good judgment to be careful about what one says or does.

def: The ability to anticipate future needs or events.

def: Courage and strength in facing pain or adversity.

def: The essential point or main idea.

def: Courage and persistence in the face of hardship.

def: Bold initiative and common sense.

def: Understanding of an event only after it has happened.

def: Cleverness and originality in solving problems.

def: A natural talent for doing something easily.

def: Spirit and courage under pressure.

def: A subtle difference in meaning, tone, or feeling.

def: Flamboyant confidence and style.

def: Graceful, composed self-assurance.

def: Exceptional skill or ability.

def: Lively energy and enthusiasm, especially in performance.

def: Physical strength and healthy energy.

def: Lively energy and enthusiasm.

def: Great enthusiasm and enjoyment.

def: The money or means needed to do something.

def: A natural ability to learn or do something.

def: Shortness and economy in speech or writing.

def: The quality of being clear and easy to understand.

def: The readiness to act first without being told.

def: In an honest and straightforward manner.

def: Not often; rarely.

def: With hands on hips and elbows turned outward.

def: A cry of triumph on discovering something.
